MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Leo Guzman .
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Michael Cook is present.
Attorney Elle Lewis representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of May-14-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
